The current monitoring plan computes PSI weekly for key numerical and categorical features, replacing the obsolete monthly‑only accuracy check.
The old monitoring plan was a monthly‑accuracy‑only plan that checked model accuracy only once per month.
PSI was added to monitor drift in key numerical and categorical features on a weekly basis, enabling detection of significant changes that can trigger model retraining.
Retraining should be triggered when the PSI crosses the alert threshold for two consecutive checks.
The v0 dashboard should display the drift status, the last check time, and whether retraining is recommended.

The weekly PSI‑based monitoring plan that computes PSI for key numerical and categorical features superseded the monthly accuracy‑only plan.
